title: Raccoon Removal in Inwood, NYC | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Inwood, NYC. Licensed experts serving Long Island. Safe, humane removal $900 – $4,000. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Inwood residents know that raccoons can become serious nuisances, especially in neighborhoods with mature trees and access to Inwood Hill Park. Our professional raccoon removal services provide safe, humane solutions to protect your home from these intelligent and persistent wildlife intruders. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive raccoon removal throughout Inwood and surrounding Long Island communities.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Inwood for years with licensed, experienced wildlife technicians who understand the unique challenges of raccoon activity in this northernmost Manhattan neighborhood. We offer guaranteed results, same-day emergency services, and follow all NYC wildlife regulations to ensure safe, permanent raccoon exclusion from your property.
localContext: Inwood's proximity to Inwood Hill Park and the Hudson River creates ideal habitat for raccoons seeking food and shelter in residential areas. The neighborhood's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, single-family homes, and wooded areas provides numerous entry points where raccoons can establish dens in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Inwood?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Inwood typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring repair, and whether babies are present. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Inwood due to Inwood Hill Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, Inwood's proximity to Inwood Hill Park, the last natural forest in Manhattan, makes raccoon encounters more common than in other NYC neighborhoods. Raccoons travel from the park into residential areas seeking food, water, and shelter, especially during breeding season in spring and when raising young.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Inwood home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Inwood for urgent situations. Most raccoon removal projects take 1-3 days for initial removal, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points. If baby raccoons are present, the process may take longer to ensure humane handling and complete family removal.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in NYC regulated?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoon removal in New York City is regulated by the Department of Health and Mental Hygiene. Best Pest Control NYC is fully licensed and follows all NYC wildlife regulations, using only humane trapping and exclusion methods. We never use poisons and ensure all animals are handled according to local laws.
